case_title: ELITE SAN FRANCISCO VS RUMMINGER DANA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,920.00 FILED BY ELITE SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT RUMMINGER DANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUMMINGER DANA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELITE SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUMMINGER DANA $1,920.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,960.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE FORM SENT TO DEFT.
NOTICE OF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT TO ELITE SAN FRANCISCO, RETURNED. ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-16-1996, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUMMINGER DANA CLAIMS ADJUDICATED THROUGH BANKCRUPTCY COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ELITE SAN FRANCISCO RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RUMMINGER DANA HEARING SET FOR OCT-16-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
